G

Game - Class in com.example.miniproyecto1.model.game
Represents the core game logic for Escritura Rapida.
Game() - Constructor for class com.example.miniproyecto1.model.game.Game
Constructs a new Game instance, initializing the level to 1 and creating a new Words manager.
GameController - Class in com.example.miniproyecto1.controller
Controller for the main game screen of Escritura Rapida.
GameController() - Constructor for class com.example.miniproyecto1.controller.GameController
 
GameKeyAdapter - Interface in com.example.miniproyecto1.controller.adapter
Interface that defines the contract for keyboard event handling in Escritura Rapida.
GameKeyHandler - Class in com.example.miniproyecto1.controller.adapter
Adapter class that bridges JavaFX keyboard events with the GameKeyAdapter interface.
GameKeyHandler() - Constructor for class com.example.miniproyecto1.controller.adapter.GameKeyHandler
 
GameOverController - Class in com.example.miniproyecto1.controller
Controller for the game over screen of Escritura Rapida.
GameOverController() - Constructor for class com.example.miniproyecto1.controller.GameOverController
 
GameStage - Class in com.example.miniproyecto1.view
Represents the game window of Escritura Rapida.
GameStage() - Constructor for class com.example.miniproyecto1.view.GameStage
Constructs the GameStage by loading the game FXML layout and displaying the stage.
generateWord() - Method in class com.example.miniproyecto1.model.game.Game
Generates a random word based on the current level difficulty.
generateWord() - Method in interface com.example.miniproyecto1.model.game.IGame
Generates and returns a random word based on the current level.
generateWord(int) - Method in interface com.example.miniproyecto1.model.words.IWords
Generates a random word based on the given level.
generateWord(int) - Method in class com.example.miniproyecto1.model.words.Words
Generates a random word based on the given level without repeating words.
getCurrent() - Static method in class com.example.miniproyecto1.util.AudioManager
Returns the currently active MediaPlayer instance.
getCurrentLevel() - Method in class com.example.miniproyecto1.model.game.Game
Returns the current level of the game.
getCurrentLevel() - Method in interface com.example.miniproyecto1.model.game.IGame
Returns the current level of the game.
getMaxLevel() - Method in class com.example.miniproyecto1.model.game.Game
Returns the maximum number of levels in the game.
getMaxLevel() - Method in interface com.example.miniproyecto1.model.game.IGame
Returns the maximum number of levels in the game.
getTimeForLevel() - Method in class com.example.miniproyecto1.model.game.Game
Calculates the time allowed for the current level.
getTimeForLevel() - Method in interface com.example.miniproyecto1.model.game.IGame
Calculates and returns the time allowed for the current level.
